title: Rust impl: Gateway-centric announce suppression
description:
Implement gateway-centric announce suppression in Rust node.

## Files to modify
- rust/src/ (locate announce scheduler and RPL modules)

## Changes
Mirror Python implementation:
1. Track DODAG membership state
2. Parse gateway-centric flag from DIO
3. Scale announce interval: 300 sec normal, 1800 sec gateway-centric
4. Resume normal interval within 60 sec of DODAG loss

## Constants
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL: 300 sec
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY: 1800 sec  
- DODAG_LOSS_RESUME_TIMEOUT: 60 sec
close_reason: Gateway-centric mode implemented across simulator, Rust, C/Zephyr, scale test: DIO flag parsed and propagated to DodagState, announce scheduler uses dynamic interval (300s normal, 1800s gateway) with reschedule on state change and 60s grace on DODAG loss, LOADng fallback enforced in routing decision when gradients stale, all tests pass including interop and scale (4% overhead), spec conformance verified.
